summary: Comprehensive testing of Catholic Professionals PNG CMS completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend authentication and admin dashboard functionality excellent. Complete end-to-end CMS functionality verified.
passed_tests: All 28 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Login button visible in main website header navbar
Login page loads with Google OAuth and email/password options
Auth me endpoint returns user info (GET /api/auth/me)
Contact messages retrieval and status update working
Page settings save and retrieve working
Gallery images listing working (234 filesystem images + DB images)
Admin dashboard loads with all 8 navigation tabs
Proper authentication protection on admin endpoints
